pi_items.source: Task description line 7 states 'Create an SVG file named star.svg'; export_result.sh line 20 searches for this exact filename; verifier.py line 81 checks for 'star.svg' reference in SLD

Task description line 7 states 'Create a new style named star_marker'; setup_task.sh line 18 references 'star_marker' style; export_result.sh lines 43-56 search for 'star_marker' style; verifier.py lines 63 and 101 check for 'star_marker'

Task description line 7 specifies 'ne_populated_places' layer; setup_geoserver.sh line 120 imports Natural Earth shapefile as 'ne_populated_places' table; export_result.sh line 64 queries 'layers/ne:ne_populated_places.json' (fully qualified name ne:ne_populated_places); layer is real data from Natural Earth 110m cultural dataset (published at naciscdn.org and naturalearth.s3.amazonaws.com)

Task description line 7 specifies 'yellow fill (#FFFF00)'; verifier.py lines 43-47 checks for 'yellow' string OR '#ffff00' OR '#ff0' in SVG content; SVG specification defines 'yellow' as standard color name corresponding to RGB(255,255,0) / #FFFF00

Task description line 7 specifies 'black stroke'; metadata value matches task requirement. However, verifier.py contains NO explicit validation of stroke color - verifier only checks for SVG existence, yellow fill, ExternalGraphic element, star.svg reference, image/svg+xml format, and layer assignment. Stroke validation is absent.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a GeoServer styling exercise using real data from the Natural Earth 110m populated places dataset (public domain geospatial data available at naciscdn.org and naturalearth.s3.amazonaws.com). The environment uses GeoServer 2.25.2, which fully supports ExternalGraphic SVG symbols in point styles. All metadata values are correct and match the task description: SVG filename is 'star.svg', style name is 'star_marker', target layer is 'ne_populated_places' (a real Natural Earth layer), fill color is yellow (#FFFF00), and stroke color is black. The verifier validates SVG existence, yellow fill color, ExternalGraphic configuration, and layer style assignment (20+20+30+20+10=100 points possible), but does NOT explicitly check for the black stroke color despite it being required in the task description.
